title: pheugo #5343
definition:
1) to flee away, seek safety by flight
 2) metaph. to flee (to shun or avoid by flight) something
    abhorrent, esp. vices
 3) to be saved by flight, to escape safely out of danger
 4) poetically, to flee away, vanish
